action.reasoning: Observation: Train failed on ReduceLROnPlateau(verbose=True) which was removed in newer torch; val AP ~0.17 but no metrics.jsonl logging so curves empty; FP+MLP baseline works with caches but loss not explicitly NaN-masked in provided (truncated) code. Analysis: Scheduler error is root cause; proper per-task masked BCEWithLogitsLoss + sklearn AP (NaN filter) + jsonl logging per epoch + best checkpoint on val_AP will enable curves and stable training. Scheduler.step(val_ap) after compute will adapt LR. 30 epochs feasible (~30min) with cache. Decision: Overwrite train.py with complete fixed version (masked loss, logging, no verbose, full val AP loop, best.pt save); keep model/predict unchanged; train 30 epochs then submit_eval on best.pt for improved avg_precision.
